ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security to which the data belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the market data is recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for dividends and stock splits */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed on the given date */,
  "total_value_traded" REAL /* Total value of shares traded on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data that is being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., dividend, split) */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date for which the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON or CSV format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., Bloomberg, Quandl) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_third_party_integrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., default_currency, default_exchange) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
